member.name: T:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.Device
member.summary: Generates events and processes commands for the TimestampGeneratorGen3 device connected at the specified serial port.

member.name: M:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.Device.CreateAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the asynchronous API to configure and interface with TimestampGeneratorGen3 devices on the specified serial port.
member.param: The name of the serial port used to communicate with the Harp device.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous initialization operation. The value of the parameter contains a new instance of the class.

member.name: F:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.Device.WhoAmI
member.summary: Represents the unique identity class of the device. This field is constant.

member.name: M:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.Device.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.Device.RegisterMap
member.summary: Gets a read-only mapping from address to register type.

member.name: T:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.AsyncDevice
member.summary: Represents an asynchronous API to configure and interface with TimestampGeneratorGen3 devices.

member.name: M:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.AsyncDevice.ReadConfigAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously reads the contents of the Config register.
member.param: A which can be used to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous read operation. The property contains the register payload.

member.name: M:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.AsyncDevice.ReadTimestampedConfigAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously reads the timestamped contents of the Config register.
member.param: A which can be used to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous read operation. The property contains the timestamped register payload.

member.name: M:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.AsyncDevice.WriteConfigAsync(Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.ConfigurationFlags,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously writes a value to the Config register.
member.param: The value to be stored in the register.
A which can be used to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The task object representing the asynchronous write operation.

member.name: M:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.AsyncDevice.ReadDevicesConnectedAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously reads the contents of the DevicesConnected register.
member.param: A which can be used to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous read operation. The property contains the register payload.

member.name: M:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.AsyncDevice.ReadTimestampedDevicesConnectedAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously reads the timestamped contents of the DevicesConnected register.
member.param: A which can be used to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous read operation. The property contains the timestamped register payload.

member.name: M:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.AsyncDevice.ReadRepeaterStatusAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously reads the contents of the RepeaterStatus register.
member.param: A which can be used to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous read operation. The property contains the register payload.

member.name: M:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.AsyncDevice.ReadTimestampedRepeaterStatusAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously reads the timestamped contents of the RepeaterStatus register.
member.param: A which can be used to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous read operation. The property contains the timestamped register payload.

member.name: M:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.AsyncDevice.WriteRepeaterStatusAsync(Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.RepeaterFlags,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously writes a value to the RepeaterStatus register.
member.param: The value to be stored in the register.
A which can be used to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The task object representing the asynchronous write operation.

member.summary: Asynchronously reads the contents of the BatteryRate register.
member.param: A which can be used to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous read operation. The property contains the register payload.

member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous read operation. The property contains the register payload.

member.name: T:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.GroupByRegister
member.summary: Represents an operator that groups the sequence of " messages by register type.

member.name: M:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.GroupByRegister.Process(System.IObservable{Bonsai.Harp.HarpMessage})
member.summary: Groups an observable sequence of messages by register type.
member.param: The sequence of Harp device messages.
member.returns: A sequence of observable groups, each of which corresponds to a unique register.

member.name: T:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.FilterRegister
member.summary: Represents an operator that filters register-specific messages reported by the device.

member.name: M:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.FilterRegister.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.Parse
member.summary: Represents an operator which filters and selects specific messages reported by the TimestampGeneratorGen3 device.

member.name: M:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.Parse.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.Format
member.summary: Represents an operator which formats a sequence of values as specific TimestampGeneratorGen3 register messages.

member.name: M:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.Format.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.Config
member.summary: Represents a register that specifies the device configuration.

member.name: F:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.Config.Address
member.summary: Represents the address of the register. This field is constant.

member.name: F:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.Config.RegisterType
member.summary: Represents the payload type of the register. This field is constant.

member.name: F:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.Config.RegisterLength
member.summary: Represents the length of the register. This field is constant.

member.name: M:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.Config.GetPayload(Bonsai.Harp.HarpMessage)
member.summary: Returns the payload data for register messages.
member.param: A object representing the register message.
member.returns: A value representing the message payload.

member.name: M:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.Config.GetTimestampedPayload(Bonsai.Harp.HarpMessage)
member.summary: Returns the timestamped payload data for register messages.
member.param: A object representing the register message.
member.returns: A value representing the timestamped message payload.

member.name: M:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.Config.FromPayload(Bonsai.Harp.MessageType,Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.ConfigurationFlags)
member.summary: Returns a Harp message for the register.
member.param: The type of the Harp message.
The value to be stored in the message payload.
member.returns: A object for the register with the specified message type and payload.

member.name: M:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.Config.FromPayload(System.Double,Bonsai.Harp.MessageType,Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.ConfigurationFlags)
member.summary: Returns a timestamped Harp message for the register.
member.param: The timestamp of the message payload, in seconds.
The type of the Harp message.
The value to be stored in the message payload.
member.returns: A object for the register with the specified message type, timestamp, and payload.

member.name: T:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.TimestampedConfig
member.summary: Provides methods for manipulating timestamped messages from the Config register.

member.name: F:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.TimestampedConfig.Address
member.summary: Represents the address of the register. This field is constant.

member.name: M:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.TimestampedConfig.GetPayload(Bonsai.Harp.HarpMessage)
member.summary: Returns timestamped payload data for register messages.
member.param: A object representing the register message.
member.returns: A value representing the timestamped message payload.

member.name: T:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.DevicesConnected

member.name: F:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.DevicesConnected.Address
member.summary: Represents the address of the register. This field is constant.

member.summary: Returns the timestamped payload data for register messages.

member.returns: A value representing the timestamped message payload.

member.returns: A object for the register with the specified message type and payload.

member.name: T:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.ConfigurationFlags
member.summary: Specifies configuration flags for the device.

member.name: F:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.ConfigurationFlags.None
member.summary: Specifies that no flags are defined.

member.name: F:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.ConfigurationFlags.StartBatteryCycle
member.summary: Starts battery cycle to extend batteries life.

member.name: F:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.ConfigurationFlags.StartDischarge
member.summary: Starts to discharge right away.

member.name: F:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.ConfigurationFlags.StartCharge
member.summary: Starts to charge right away.

member.name: F:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.ConfigurationFlags.Stop
member.summary: Stop any control of the battery and resume normal function.

member.name: T:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.ConnectedDevices
member.summary: Specifies if an output port has a device connected.

member.name: T:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.RepeaterFlags
member.summary: Specifies whether the device is a clock repeater.

member.name: T:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.BatteryRateConfiguration
member.summary: Specifies the rate at which the battery charge event is sent.

member.name: T:Harp.TimestampGeneratorGen3.TimerRate
member.summary: Specifies the rate at which the timer counter is sent.
